title: Rework how we decide what to filter out of layer diffs
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind bug

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

After narrowing down the list of parent directories which we might need to exclude to those which are present in the base image, filter them out of the layer diff as it is generated.

#### How to verify it

Updated integration test!
Updated unit tests for supporting functions!

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Follows up on #6296/#6306 and #6302/#6319.

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

This one was hard to find because "--squash" does different things in `podman build` than it does in `buildah build`, so podman's attempt to run our tests ended up testing a combination of options there that we weren't testing here.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
